title: Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
company: Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates!
